feature: Fix progress bar colors and dark mode badge/hover in daily-view.tsx

prompts.description: Replace vivid progress bar colors with muted palette-specific classes
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx: (1) calorie over-target bar — change bg-destructive to bg-rose-400/70 dark:bg-rose-500/50; (2) MacroProgress color props — protein to bg-emerald-400/70 dark:bg-emerald-500/50, carbs to bg-amber-400/70 dark:bg-amber-500/50, fat to bg-sky-400/70 dark:bg-sky-500/50.

prompts.description: Fix meal type badge specificity and ensure Recipe hover classes are correct
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx: (1) meal type badge — replace dashboard-meta-pill with inline classes to avoid base-class conflict; (2) confirm Recipe & details and Swap buttons have hover:bg-secondary dark:hover:bg-secondary.
